name: video-clip
title: VideoClip
description: A video clip with agent-friendly trim (`startAt` / `endAt` accept `"0:04"` / `"30s"`), Onda's entrance and exit fade fingerprint, and optional looping. Wraps Remotion's `<OffthreadVideo>` for accurate seek and no audio drift. Fills the canvas by default; pass `placement` to position as a sub-canvas element.
pickWhen: any video footage — b-roll, recorded demo, talking head. The default. For a UI capture, wrap in `device-frame` or `browser-frame`.
